description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring upright, elongated green leaves that resemble those of a snake plant (Sansevieria). The leaves are thick, pointed, and arranged in a dense cluster, radiating from the center of the pot. The pot itself is cylindrical with a slightly tapered base and has a matte, textured surface in a light beige or taupe color, giving it a natural, earthy appearance. There are no visible decorative patterns or embellishments on the pot, which appears to be made of ceramic or clay. The plant looks healthy, with leaves of varying heights and subtle color gradients from deep green to lighter green at the tips. This type of potted plant is commonly used for indoor decoration, adding a touch of greenery to urban environments such as homes, offices, or cafes.
description: A medium-sized potted snake plant with upright, pointed green leaves in a plain, matte beige ceramic pot. The arrangement is dense and natural, ideal for indoor decor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height and density of the upright green leaves, with the plain beige pot clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlights the depth of the pot and the overlapping arrangement of the leaves, with more shadow on the foliage.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizes the clustered leaf arrangement and the circular opening of the pot.
description_view_3: Another angled view showing the side of the pot and the varying heights of the leaves, with more light on the foliage.
